insight_events.title: EPS (basic) decelerating
insight_events.summary: EPS (basic) growth moved from +62.4% to -63.0% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Trailing-twelve-month growth confirms the same direction. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
insight_events.why_it_matters: Negative evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Compare this development with the thesis, falsifiers, and valuation assumptions.

insight_events.title: Cash conversion (CFO/revenue) accelerating
insight_events.summary: Cash conversion (CFO/revenue) growth moved from +25.6% to +8.3% YoY in the latest quarter. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
insight_events.why_it_matters: Positive evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Compare this development with the thesis, falsifiers, and valuation assumptions.
